review_notes.artifact_result: Existing Roadmap 2.10 files define offline manifest inputs and documentation-level artifact expectations, but no concrete Roadmap 2.10 run-output artifacts were found in the repository.
review_notes.candidate_decision: No evidence-backed compatibility fix candidates were found.
review_notes.no_candidates_reason: The reviewed files do not contain concrete per-sample comparison results, warning rollups, review queue outputs, readiness bucket outputs, or documented mismatch findings suitable for Roadmap 2.11 fix candidate selection.
